enumerates_branch_character_replacements.note: the scout enumerates representative-feasible branch-character replacements

imports_verified_feasible_patterns.note: branch scout imports the verified observed operator inventory

imports_verified_generation_replay.note: branch scout starts from the verified representative-gated generation replay

matrix_gates_are_recomputed.note: index, anomaly, and slope gates are recomputed before representative promotion

mines_requested_seed_and_pattern_sets.note: the scout covers the requested 14 pruned survivors and 16 observed operator shapes

outcome_is_resolved.note: the scout either emits selection-gated survivors or proves zero promotion-ready replacements

representative_audit_is_selection_gated.note: promotion is only allowed after q=1, refined selection, and proton gates

selection_preservation_is_tested.note: the scout distinguishes q1 loss from matrix-certified selection-preserving variants

interpretation.active_obstruction: most representative-feasible branch replacements destroy q=1; the surviving selection-preserving replacements are representative-compatible scout targets
interpretation.caveat: compatible rows are synthetic branch-character replacements over fixed matrices; they are not yet new full matrix/cup-product certificates
interpretation.current_result: selection-preserving branch replacement finds representative-compatible, cup-product-eligible branch-character scout targets pending full realization checks
